channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cameron Smith raises concerns over Adam Reynolds' fitness for upcoming Broncos games
item.description: Cameron Smith has highlighted the tough decision that Brisbane Broncos coach Michael Maguire now faces following an injury to star halfback Adam Reynolds. Reynolds, a key playmaker for the Broncos, ha...

item.title: Windsor-Essex sees early wildlife activity with first turtle rescue of the season
item.description: As temperatures fluctuate in Windsor-Essex, local wildlife is beginning to emerge from winter dormancy. A recent early rescue of a turtle highlighted the start of the region's seasonal wildlife activi...

item.title: Iranian Hacker Group Handala Linked to Retaliatory Cyberattacks on US and Israeli Targets
item.description: Since late February, following a series of air strikes by the United States and Israel on Iran, cybersecurity experts have warned of potential Iranian retaliatory attacks. These warnings became a real...

item.title: Suspended Police Official’s Alleged Loan and Luxury Purchases Under Scrutiny at Commission
item.description: Suspended police organised crime boss Major-General Richard Shibiri appeared before the Madlanga commission following allegations of receiving a R70,000 loan from businessman Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala. S...

item.title: Tinubu boosts military support as security forces revise tactics against insurgents
item.description: Na today, March 12, 2026, wey President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don approve more military equipment to support Nigeria security forces for fight against insurgents and bandits nationwide. Defence Minister, ...

item.title: Authorities respond to shooting and vehicle ramming at Temple Israel in West Bloomfield, Michigan
item.description: On Thursday afternoon, an active shooter incident occurred at Temple Israel, a synagogue in West Bloomfield, Michigan. The incident reportedly began shortly before 1 p.m., with reports of smoke emergi...

item.title: Controller of Budget Flags Unbudgeted Sh44.5m Spend by Deputy President's Spouse Office
item.description: Controller of Budget Margaret Nyakang’o has expressed regret over an accounting error where the Office of the Spouse of Deputy President Kithure Kindiki spent Sh44.52 million in the first half of the ...

item.title: Authorities seize P204 million shabu in Occidental Mindoro waters
item.description: Authorities in Occidental Mindoro discovered another batch of illegal drugs as 30 kilos of shabu, estimated at P204 million, were found floating near Paluan. The discovery was close to the site where ...

item.title: Archie Moore Explores His Father’s Life Through Gold at the Adelaide Biennial
item.description: Archie Moore’s latest exhibition, Remnants Of My Father (2025), is part of the 2026 Adelaide Biennial of Australian Art, curated by Ellie Buttrose. The display at Adelaide’s Museum of Economic Botany ...

item.title: Middle East conflict escalates as Iran and Israel intensify military actions; millions displaced
item.description: The Middle East conflict has escalated sharply following the appointment of Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, who vowed to avenge the deaths of martyrs and continue blocking the s...

item.title: PM Shehbaz meets Saudi Crown Prince, pledges Pakistan’s support amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif visited Saudi Arabia for a brief, restricted meeting with Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman in Jeddah, expressing Pakistan’s full solidarity and support amid rising region...

item.title: Burlington man faces charges following police shooting during traffic stop
item.description: A 28-year-old man in Burlington is facing criminal charges following an incident in which he was shot by police during a traffic stop. The incident occurred after local officers attempted to stop the ...

item.title: ASI approves new excavation at Balirajgarh Fort amid long-standing neglect
item.description: The Balirajgarh Fort in Madhubani district of Bihar, officially listed as the 'Remains of Ancient Fort of Garh', has long suffered from neglect despite being a centrally protected historical site. Loc...

item.title: Ongoing Iran Conflict Escalates: Strait of Hormuz Closed, Oil Prices Surge, and Regional Tensions Rise
item.description: The conflict between Iran, the United States, and Israel has entered its 13th day, with Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, declaring that the strategic Strait of Hormuz will remain...

item.title: Canada announces $37 million humanitarian aid package for Lebanese civilians amid ongoing conflict
item.description: On March 12, 2026, the Canadian government, led by Prime Minister Mark Carney, pledged more than $37 million in humanitarian assistance to support civilians in Lebanon affected by the escalating confl...

item.title: Attacks on desalination plants escalate concerns over civilian water supplies in Gulf amid Iran war
item.description: Amid the ongoing Iran war, which began in late February 2026 with US and Israeli strikes, water infrastructure has emerged as a critical new target. On March 8, Bahrain reported that an Iranian drone ...

item.title: High Court Suspends NTSA Instant Traffic Fines Pending Legal Review
item.description: The High Court of Kenya has temporarily put on hold the NTSA's new instant traffic fines system. This system, recently launched by the National Transport and Safety Authority, allowed motorists to pay...

item.title: Ex-Steinhoff audit executive convicted for negligence in R376 million fraud
item.description: A former audit executive at the Steinhoff group, Hein Odendaal, 67, has been sentenced by the Pretoria specialised commercial crimes court to four years’ imprisonment or a R2 million fine for negligen...

item.title: Congress Proposes Legislation to Require Warrants for FBI Access to Americans’ Communications
item.description: A bipartisan group of U.S. lawmakers has introduced the Government Surveillance Reform Act of 2026, aiming to impose strict warrant requirements on the FBI’s access to Americans’ communications collec...

item.title: Ayra Starr Praises Nigerian Men During US Interview
item.description: For her recent interview on 'Way Up With Angela Yee', Ayra Starr talk plenty about Nigerian men and how dem dey supportive. She yan say Nigerian men sabi take care of their women, dey confident, and d...
